entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `dateEpochDay` INTEGER NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL COLLATE NOCASE, `startMinutes` INTEGER NOT NULL, `durationMinutes` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_blocks_dateEpochDay_startMinutes
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_blocks_dateEpochDay_startMinutes` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`dateEpochDay`, `startMinutes`)

indices.name: index_blocks_title_dateEpochDay_startMinutes_durationMinutes
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_blocks_title_dateEpochDay_startMinutes_durationMinutes` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`title`, `dateEpochDay`, `startMinutes`, `durationMinutes`)
